name: Tyrique (Ty) Daniel
headline: Front End Developer | Next.js | TypeScript | A11y | SEO | Micro-Frontends
paragraphs: I am writing to express my strong interest in the Front End Developer position at Tech Innovations Inc. With over 8 years of experience building high-performance, accessible, and SEO-friendly web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript, I am confident in my ability to contribute immediately to your engineering team.

In my recent role as CTO / Frontend Architect at Deal Scale, I spearheaded the development of SSR surfaces optimized for page speed and Core Web Vitals. I established a Storybook-driven UI library that increased cross-team consistency and significantly reduced redundant work. I also successfully delivered modular features implementing a micro-frontend style architecture, which enabled parallel team velocity and streamlined our CI/CD pipelines.

I am particularly drawn to Tech Innovations Inc. because of your commitment to creating accessible, scaleable user interfaces. I believe my deep expertise in WCAG compliance, semantic markup, and comprehensive testing methodologies aligns perfectly with the standards required for this role.

Thank you for considering my application. I have attached my resume and I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background, skills, and strategic approach to frontend architecture can support the continued growth of Tech Innovations Inc.
